Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}finally!!! class is over![n]{f 1 5 0}you wanna hang out after school?[n]{f 1 5 0}i'm gonna stick around for a bit, so just swing by my desk if you're down {f 1 3 137}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}you got any plans after this? if you're free, let's hang.[n]{f 1 5 0}i'll be at my seat, as usual {f 1 3 137}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}sorry dude, but you're the only one I can count on... don't ask why, just come, ok!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}let's hang out after school {f 1 3 135}{f 1 3 135}[n]there's something i wanna talk to you about!!![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}RAMEN! RAMEN! RAMEN![n]{f 1 5 0}RAMEN! RAMEN! RAMEN![n]{f 1 5 0}bet you're cravin' some RAMEN now! whaddaya say? {f 1 3 137}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}just when i finally made up my mind to work hard for a brighter future, something's gotta drag me down {f 1 3 138}[n]will you hear me out?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}sorry, i know it's short notice, but i'm in a real pinch {f 1 3 138}{f 1 3 138}{f 1 3 138}[n]you're the only one i've got...[n]{f 1 5 0}can we talk?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}i've made up my mind. i wanna explain everything to you, from beginning to end.[n]{f 1 5 0}can we meet up?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 1}-san, are you free today?[n]{f 1 5 0}Let's go on a date {f 1 3 132}[n]I wanna eat ramen together~[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}let's hang after school if you're free {f 1 3 137}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}you busy? gimme a shout if you wanna hang. i'll be in the classroom[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}since we've got the day off, hit me up if you wanna go somewhere. i'll be free 'til the afternoon {f 1 3 137}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}they're showing a flick i really wanna catch {f 1 3 151}[n]it'll light a fire in your heart, man![n]{f 1 5 0}i already got tickets, so lemme know if you wanna come by noon![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}you know the flower shop at port island station?[n]{f 1 5 0}the lady working there is kinda cute, but the flowers are so friggin' expensive {f 1 3 155} i can only afford a few seedlings![n]{f 1 5 0}anyways, that's all i wanted to complain about {f 1 3 138}[n]{f 1 1}
